Class ReminderTracker

java.lang.Object
controller.ReminderTracker
public class ReminderTracker extends Object
Singleton class for managing reminders in the system. This class handles the creation, storage, retrieval, and management of user reminders. It provides methods for adding new reminders, retrieving user-specific reminders, marking reminders as completed, and persisting reminder data to disk.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static ReminderTracker getInstance()
      Gets the singleton instance of the ReminderTracker. Creates a new instance if one doesn't exist.
      Returns:
      The singleton instance of ReminderTracker

    • addReminder

      public Reminder addReminder(String name, double amount, LocalDate dueDate, LocalDate reminderDate, int userId)
      Adds a new reminder to the tracker. Creates a new Reminder object with the given parameters and a unique ID.
      Parameters:
      name - The name or description of the reminder
      amount - The monetary amount associated with the reminder
      dueDate - The date when the reminder is due
      reminderDate - The date when the user should be reminded
      userId - The ID of the user who owns this reminder
      Returns:
      The newly created Reminder object

    • getUserReminders

      public List<Reminder> getUserReminders(int userId)
      Gets all reminders for a specific user. Filters the reminders list to include only those belonging to the specified user.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user whose reminders to retrieve
      Returns:
      A list of Reminder objects belonging to the specified user

    • markReminderCompleted

      public boolean markReminderCompleted(int reminderId, int userId)
      Marks a reminder as completed. Finds the reminder with the specified ID belonging to the specified user and marks it as completed.
      Parameters:
      reminderId - The ID of the reminder to mark as completed
      userId - The ID of the user who owns the reminder
      Returns:
      true if the reminder was found and marked as completed, false otherwise

    • clearData

      public void clearData()
      Clears all reminders from memory. Removes all reminders from the list and resets the reminder ID counter.

    • loadData

      public void loadData(int userId)
      Loads reminders for a specific user from storage. Reads serialized reminder data from a user-specific file and adds the reminders to the in-memory list.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user whose reminders to load

    • saveData

      public void saveData(int userId)
      Saves reminders for a specific user to storage. Writes the user's reminders to a user-specific file as serialized objects.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user whose reminders to save
